description: Use this API to add an individual adjustable branch reactance data record to the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing adjustable branch reactance data record. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_adjbrx_indv(eibus, ejbus, cktid, intgar, realar)
python_syntax: ierr = opf_adjbrx_indv(eibus, ejbus, cktid, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: eibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ejbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

intgar.description: cost curve type. This value is not currently used by the program.
adjustable branch reactance status (default of 1 if new record, current value otherwise).
cost table cross reference number. This value is not currently used by the program.

realar.description: reactance multiplier in pu (default value of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
maximum reactance multiplier in pu (default value of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
minimum reactance multiplier in pu (default value of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
cost scale coefficient in $/pu (default value of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).

error_codes.description: non-fatal error occurred. Warning messages are as follows: - Invalid cost curve type specified - Invalid branch reactance status specified. - Maximum branch reactance multiplier less than minimum multiplier - Branch reactance multiplier cannot be less than 0.1. - Branch reactance multiplier cannot be set to zero.
specified branch cannot be a transformer.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
